caption: A man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt and headphones sits in a room with red walls and a "Lucky's" neon sign in the background. He is centered in a picture-in-picture window in the lower right of the screen, while the main view displays a Google Sheet titled "TH 5/13 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBA...". In the first frame, the man looks at the camera; by the final frame, he is gesturing toward the screen. A red YouTube subscribe bar at the bottom reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. As the video progresses, a cursor moves across the spreadsheet, highlighting various names and adding text in blue and red, such as "KEN GRIFFEY JR 5/20" and "DON GRAFFEF 5/20". A yellow banner at the bottom displays the text "WWW.JAEPYSCARDBREAKS.COM".
